mapper.select: SELECT place_id, place_type, name, address, view_count, latitude, longitude, image_url, created_at FROM PLACE WHERE place_id = #{place_id}
SELECT ticket_id, festival_id, ticket_type, price, stock, description FROM FESTIVAL_TICKET WHERE festival_id = #{festival_id}
SELECT price FROM ACCOMMODATION WHERE accommodation_id = #{place_id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'R' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_RES.NEXTVAL, 5, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RESERVATION ( reservation_id, user_id, place_id, check_in, ticket_id, guest_count, request_note, status ) VALUES ( #{reservation_id}, #{user_id}, #{place_id}, #{check_in}, #{ticket_id}, #{guest_count}, #{request_note}, 'PENDING' )

SELECT 'R' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_RES.NEXTVAL, 5, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RESERVATION ( reservation_id, user_id, place_id, check_in, check_out, guest_count, request_note, status ) VALUES ( #{reservation_id}, #{user_id}, #{place_id}, #{check_in}, #{check_out}, #{guest_count}, #{request_note}, 'PENDING' )

SELECT 'R' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_RES.NEXTVAL, 5, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RESERVATION ( reservation_id, user_id, place_id, check_in, visit_time, guest_count, request_note, status ) VALUES ( #{reservation_id}, #{user_id}, #{place_id}, #{check_in}, #{visit_time}, #{guest_count}, #{request_note}, 'PENDING' )

SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_RES.NEXTVAL, 3, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO PAYMENT ( payment_id, user_id, reservation_id, amount, payment_method, payment_status ) VALUES ( #{payment_id}, #{user_id}, #{reservation_id}, #{amount}, #{payment_method, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'PENDING' )
mapper.select:
SELECT r.reservation_id, r.user_id, r.place_id, r.check_in, r.check_out, r.visit_time, r.ticket_id, r.guest_count, r.request_note, r.status, r.created_at AS res_created_at, r.updated_at AS res_updated_at,
p.place_type, p.name, p.address, p.view_count, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.image_url, p.created_at AS place_created_at, p.updated_at AS place_updated_at FROM RESERVATION r JOIN PLACE p ON r.place_id = p.place_id WHERE r.user_id = #{user_id} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
